results.title: Stars’ Robertson Due for a Significant Pay Raise This Offseason
results.description: Jason Robertson is one of the most intriguing players of this NHL offseason. Slated to become a restricted free agent on July 1, he’s due for a significant pay raise from his $7.875 million cap hit.

results.title: McCune “walks” it off as Trimble tops Notre Dame in extras, punches ticket to district final game
results.description: LOGAN — There might not be any better feeling than taking a game-winning at-bat to deliver a walk-off victory for your team, especially in a tournament game, where every moment can be life-or-death.

results.title: Kenney Shields Park to get new, temporary basketball courts
results.description: Kenney Shields Park in Covington will be getting temporary (but long-term) basketball courts following a vote Tuesday night from the Covington Board of Commissioners. The commissioners also voted to create a temporary walking path to augment the new courts. Kenney Shields Park is located in Covington’s Mainstrasse neighborhood and has been a community landmark for [...] The post Kenney Shields Park to get new, temporary basketball courts appeared first on LINK nky .
